trivia_bullets.text: Core Set 2021 (M21, released 2020-07-03) was the last entry in the post-2019 standalone core set run (Core Set 2022 was not produced). Core sets served as beginner-entry products with no specific plane affiliation. Staunch Shieldmate is a generic dwarf soldier of no named world.

A vanilla 1/3 Dwarf Soldier for one white mana — no abilities, all stats. The 1/3 distribution is unusually defensive for a one-drop. Legal in Pauper and Pauper Commander. EDHREC rank: 24,757 — negligible Commander uptake consistent with a no-text common.

Flavor text: 'Gilded with gold from a dragon's trove, it is! And etched with the image of the dragon I slew to take it.' — The unnamed dwarf speaker boasts about the shield visible in the card art, which is depicted as gold with a dragon-head engraving — an unusually tight art-flavor correspondence for a common card.

Artist Bartłomiej Gaweł is a Polish illustrator with approximately 9 credited MTG cards (Gatherer), making Staunch Shieldmate one of his early Wizards commissions. He later contributed to the Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth set.
sources: Gatherer: artist search for Bartłomiej Gaweł (via WebSearch)
